description:
Create a B-V color index map by subtracting the V-band FITS image from the B-band FITS image.

Instructions:
1. Open both 'Bcomb.fits' and 'Vcomb.fits' from ~/AstroImages/raw/ in AstroImageJ.
2. Use the Image Calculator (Process > Image Calculator...) to subtract the V-band image from the B-band image (Image 1: Bcomb.fits, Operation: Subtract, Image 2: Vcomb.fits).
3. CRITICAL: Ensure the '32-bit (float) result' option is checked so negative color indices are not clipped.
4. Save the resulting image to ~/AstroImages/processed/m12_B_minus_V.fits as a FITS file.
